gempyor.parameters¶

Abstractions for interacting with the parameters configurations.

This module contains abstractions for interacting with the parameters section of given config files. Namely it contains the Parameters class.

Classes

Parameters(parameter_config, *, ti, tf, ...)

Encapsulates logic for loading, parsing, and summarizing parameter configurations.

gempyor API
